_risk_level_doc: Single test file, no logic change, no security impact, no cross-file ripple.

requirement.original: Fix a security vulnerability in hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py: BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE matches commit messages without verifying a valid bulk-commit sentinel exists. When a commit message matches, the privilege guard allows the commit WITHOUT verifying sentinel. Any agent can use auto-bulk: in BULK=false mode to bypass grant verification.
requirement.clarified: The described vulnerability was already fixed in commit 41063a1. The remaining actionable item is a failing unit test: test_fails_without_session_id strips only CLAUDE_SESSION_ID but the writer also resolves via CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, so the test does not achieve its stated goal when CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is set.
requirement.what: Fix env-strip in test_fails_without_session_id to exclude both CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID
requirement.why: The test is broken: it does not reproduce the failure condition it is named for when running in a Claude Code session where CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is present. This means the test silently passes over the failure mode it is supposed to catch.
constraints: Only one line changes — the env dict comprehension filter on line 189
No changes to writer, guard, or any other file

path_dependent_shared_infra: scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py (read-only reference for env var names)

out_of_scope_observations.observation: The primary BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE sentinel enforcement vulnerability described in the requirement was fixed in commit 41063a1 (2026-05-24). The _evaluate_commit() function now requires _has_bulk_commit_sentinel() to return True before allowing auto-bulk: commits. No fix needed here.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: pytest reports FAILED for test_fails_without_session_id: AssertionError: SystemExit not raised
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The test constructs its isolated environment by filtering out only CLAUDE_SESSION_ID. The write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py _resolve_sid() function (added at commit 21500b1) accepts EITHER CLAUDE_SESSION_ID OR CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID. In Claude Code agent sessions, CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is always set, so the writer successfully resolves the SID and exits 0 instead of 2.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: 21500b1 - fix(hooks,agents,tests): extend write-bulk-commit-sentinel guard with venv allowlist and agent DO NOT items (added CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID fallback to _resolve_sid without updating test)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID was added as a fallback to support environments where only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is available, improving robustness of the writer. The test was not updated to reflect the expanded env var check.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: The test is supposed to verify the 'neither SID env var is set' failure path. By missing CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID in the strip list, the test cannot reach that path in any Claude Code agent context, silently testing nothing about the failure mode.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Test breakage was introduced when CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID was added to scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:56 without a corresponding test update.
observations: pytest hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py::TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript::test_fails_without_session_id: FAILED — AssertionError: SystemExit not raised (observed: direct pytest run, 2026-05-29)
CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID=96c8ad3a-d367-49a2-87e5-c29ec88e2947 is set in the environment (observed: env command, 2026-05-29)
write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:56 reads CLAUDE_SESSION_ID OR CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID (inferred: source Read)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Direct pytest run showed test_fails_without_session_id FAILED with 'AssertionError: SystemExit not raised'. env command confirmed CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is present. Source read of write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:56 confirmed the dual-env-var fallback. Source read of test at line 189 confirmed only CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is stripped.
root_cause_analysis.located_source: hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py:189 — env dict comprehension strips only CLAUDE_SESSION_ID

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: not a regression complaint; direct test failure observed by running pytest

requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: N/A — enforcement verified present at pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:548-568
GIVEN both CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID absent from test env, WHEN _writer.main([]) is called, THEN SystemExit(2) is raised

component_chain.role: _resolve_sid() reads CLAUDE_SESSION_ID OR CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID; exits 2 if both absent
test_fails_without_session_id: must reproduce 'both SIDs absent' condition to verify exit 2
component_chain.evidence: Read of test file line 189; pytest run showing failure

setup.reason: non-UI -- hook; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths

evidence.observed: pytest hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py shows 1 failed: test_fails_without_session_id — AssertionError: SystemExit not raised

measured.value: test env at line 189 strips only CLAUDE_SESSION_ID; CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID=96c8ad3a... is present in agent environment

expected.value: test must strip both CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID so writer exits 2

evidence.gap: One env var key missing from the strip list in the test dict comprehension

all_occurrences: hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py:189 (the only test location missing CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID strip)

reference_source.description: scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py _resolve_sid() function — direct source read this session

attempts.artifact_path: commit 41063a1 — fix(hooks): enforce bulk-commit sentinel for auto-bulk: BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE
attempts.proposed_solution: Add _has_bulk_commit_sentinel() and require it for BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE commits; add -F <tmpfile> extraction
attempts.actual_change: pretool-git-privilege-guard.py (sentinel check + -F extraction), agents/changelog-analyst.md (message format), hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py (15 tests)
attempts.outcome: Primary vulnerability fixed. 14/15 tests pass. test_fails_without_session_id fails because CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID was added to writer without updating test.

novelty_check.rationale: Prior fix targeted behavioral logic (L4 sentinel enforcement). This fix targets test data setup (L3 env dict construction). Different layer, different file category (test vs. production code).

context.codebase_state: master branch, 244a392 HEAD — 83 commits since 41063a1 which fixed the primary vulnerability
context.recent_commits: 41063a1 fix(hooks): enforce bulk-commit sentinel for auto-bulk: BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE; 21500b1 fix(hooks,agents,tests): extend write-bulk-commit-sentinel guard with venv allowlist and agent DO NOT items

development_approach.strategy: Single-line test fix: change the env dict comprehension filter to exclude both CLAUDE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID.
development_approach.validation_approach: Run pytest hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py — expect 15 passed, 0 failed.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Draft is minimal and precise. Guard already requires _has_bulk_commit_sentinel() before allowing BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE commits. Proposed test-only fix is correctly scoped. All findings are OBSERVATION_ONLY — no blockers raised.

findings.issue: Draft is minimal and precise for the stated requirement. Current guard already enforces sentinel check. Test fix is correctly scoped to both env vars.
findings.rationale: Codex confirmed the analysis; no changes needed to the spec.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: No changes required — codex confirmed scope and proposed fix are correct.

research_findings.reason: Straightforward test bug fix with clear root cause — env var key missing from strip set
